posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Half of New York City Schools Are Failing despite spending "$36,293 per pupil, double the national average of $17,619." In 503 schools, majority of students failed both math & reading standardized tests. They spent $40 Billion, up 67% from $24B in 2014. 35% of students are chronically absent.

link_metadata.description: Nearly half of New York City public schools are failing to get a majority of their students to pass standardized tests measuring math and reading, even though the city is spending about twice as much money on the schools as other districts do, a devastating new report from the Success Academy charter school network says.
link_metadata.title: Close to Half of New York City Schools Are Failing, New Report Says

posts.title: Half of New York City Schools Are Failing despite spending "$36,293 per pupil, double the national average of $17,619." In 503 schools, majority of students failed both math & reading standardized tests. They spent $40 Billion, up 67% from $24B in 2014. 35% of students are chronically absent.

link_metadata.description: Nearly half of New York City public schools are failing to get a majority of their students to pass standardized tests measuring math and reading, even though the city is spending about twice as much money on the schools as other districts do, a devastating new report from the Success Academy charter school network says.
link_metadata.title: Close to Half of New York City Schools Are Failing, New Report Says
